title: CMC Title 1, Section 102
text:
TITLE 1:
GENERAL PROVISIONS
§ 102. Commonwealth: Defined.
“Commonwealth,” when used in this code to describe a geographical area,
means the Northern Mariana Islands, as defined in 1 CMC § 101; otherwise, it
means the government established under the Constitution which became effective
on January 9, 1978.
Source: N.M.I. Const. Sched. on Transit’l Matters § 9, modified.
Commission Comment: The Commission inserted a colon in place of a
dash in the heading of this section to conform the heading to the style used
elsewhere in the code. According to PL 3-90, § 7(a) (reprinted in the preface
material, prior to title 1), “section headings . . . do not in any manner affect the
scope, meaning, or intent of the provisions of this Code.”
